verbatim_note: All titles/urls from AGENT 4's OWN real WebSearch; independent; no fabrication.

candidates.notes: INDEPENDENTLY CONFIRMED the claimed colliding paper. Using different phrasing than A3, both of my fresh searches returned 'Mixture of Attention Heads: Selecting Attention Heads Per Token' (Zhang, Shen et al., EMNLP 2022) at arxiv.org/abs/2210.05144 and aclanthology.org/2022.emnlp-main.278/. The search descriptions confirm it is exactly a LEARNED TOKEN-CHOICE router that 'dynamically selects a subset of k attention heads per token' with a router computing per-token confidences over attention-head experts. This is precisely the CAND_016_001 niche (replacing MoSA expert-choice head routing with a learned token-choice router over attention-head experts). Real collision; A3 verdict corroborated.

candidates.notes: Adversarially searched with different phrasing than A3; found NO direct collision. Closest hits: 'More Experts Than Galaxies: Conditionally-overlapping Experts With Biologically-Inspired Fixed Routing' (arxiv 2410.08003 / COMET) uses a FIXED biologically-inspired random projection for expert overlap, NOT a tunable sigmoidal/Hill-coefficient gate-steepness for switch-like specificity; 'Sigmoid Gating is More Sample Efficient...' is framed on sample efficiency not TF ultrasensitivity transfer; biology sources (Hill function / ultrasensitivity, PNAS 2318329121, biorxiv 2023.02.28.529800) are pure biology with no MoE transfer. No paper-like source transfers transcription-factor ultrasensitivity / sigmoidal binding cooperativity into MoE router gate-steepness for specificity. A3 verdict (FALSE) corroborated.

candidates.notes: Adversarially searched with different phrasing than A3; found NO bridging paper. The two domains appear ONLY separately: MoE/expert-choice routing papers (arxiv 2202.09368 Expert Choice Routing, 2209.01667 sparse expert review) are pure ML with no biology application; the interferon-beta enhancer / IRF-NF-kB synergy biology (biorxiv 2025.02.04.636520, PMC12377728, enhanceosome PMC3192840) is pure biology with no MoE/expert-choice modeling. Both search engines explicitly stated the results do NOT connect these two concepts. No paper-like source repurposes MoSA-style expert-choice token routing to model promoter-specific ultrasensitive TF activation. A3 verdict (FALSE) corroborated.
